what_it_does: Provides a hosted/API-oriented lip-sync reference for turning speech into synchronized face video.
succinct_summary: Useful as an integration sketch for a quick Morgan lip-sync demo backed by external service APIs.
possible_use: Prototype a simple audio-to-talking-portrait path or mirror its API/UI shape for Morgan demos.
important_notes:
Likely depends on 302.AI service credentials and external model availability; verify licensing and latency before adopting. README hint:
